term: Give That Whole Does It Part Just Another Glance
pronunciation: /ɡɪv ðæt hoʊl dʌz ɪt pɑrt dʒʌst əˈnʌðər ɡlæns/
englishDefinitions: Look at that part again briefly.
Review the 'does it' part one more time.
persianTranslation: آن بخش را یک بار دیگر نگاه کن
اون قسمتِ «does it» را دوباره یک نگاه بنداز
examples: Could you give that whole does it part just another glance?
She asked him to give that whole does it part just another glance before sending it.
Let's give that whole does it part just another glance and make sure it sounds right.
